ddls:
CREATE TABLE "protein_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein interaction */,
  "atom_contact_areas_mirror" REAL /* Atom contact areas of the mirror protein */,
  "polarity_target" REAL /* Polarity of the target protein */,
  "mass_target" REAL /* Mass of the target protein */,
  "atom_contact_areas_target" TEXT /* Atom contact areas of the target protein */,
  "polarizability_target" REAL /* Polarizability of the target protein */,
  "hydrophilicity_target" REAL /* Hydrophilicity of the target protein */,
  "sd_s_ch_dpx_target" REAL /* Standard deviation of s_ch_dpx of the target protein */,
  "rel_s_ch_ASA_target" REAL /* Relative s_ch_ASA of the target protein */,
  "rel_s_ch_dpx_target" REAL /* Relative s_ch_dpx of the target protein */,
  "atom_contacts_mirror" REAL /* Atom contacts of the mirror protein */,
  "rel_dpx_target" REAL /* Relative dpx of the target protein */,
  "residue_contacts_mirror" REAL /* Residue contacts of the mirror protein */,
  "hydrophobicity_mirror" REAL /* Hydrophobicity of the mirror protein */,
  "polarizability_mirror" REAL /* Polarizability of the mirror protein */,
  "ss_mirror" TEXT /* Secondary structure of the mirror protein (e.g., helix, sheet) */,
  "class_intra" TEXT /* Classification of the interaction within the protein */,
  "class_mirror" TEXT /* Classification of the mirror protein */,
  "hydrophobicity_target" REAL /* Hydrophobicity of the target protein */,
  "sd_dpx_target" REAL /* Standard deviation of dpx of the target protein */,
  "s_ch_ave_dpx_target" REAL /* Average s_ch_dpx of the target protein */,
  "ss_target" TEXT /* Secondary structure of the target protein (e.g., helix, sheet) */,
  "ave_dpx_target" REAL /* Average dpx of the target protein */,
  "classtarget" TEXT /* Class of the target protein (e.g., hotspot, nonhotspot) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction was recorded */,
  "interaction_source" TEXT /* Source of the interaction data (e.g., experiment, simulation) */,
  "interaction_confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the interaction */,
  "interaction_method" TEXT /* Method used to determine the interaction (e.g., X-ray crystallography, NMR) */,
  "interaction_temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the interaction was observed */,
  "interaction_pH" REAL /* pH at which the interaction was observed */,
  "interaction_env_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the interaction (e.g., buffer, solvent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_interactions_classtarget FOREIGN KEY ("classtarget") REFERENCES interaction_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_interactions_ss_mirror FOREIGN KEY ("ss_mirror") REFERENCES secondary_structures ("structure_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_interactions_ss_target FOREIGN KEY ("ss_target") REFERENCES secondary_structures ("structure_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the protein in amino acids */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the protein */,
  "isoelectric_point" REAL /* Isoelectric point of the protein */,
  "amino_acid_composition" TEXT /* Amino acid composition of the protein */,
  "protein_function" TEXT /* Biological function of the protein */,
  "protein_family" TEXT /* Family to which the protein belongs */,
  "protein_origin" TEXT /* Origin of the protein (e.g., human, bacterial) */,
  "protein_expression_level" TEXT /* Expression level of the protein (e.g., high, low) */,
  "protein_mutations" TEXT /* Known mutations in the protein sequence */,
  "protein_disease_association" TEXT /* Diseases associated with the protein */,
  "protein_complexes" TEXT /* Complexes the protein is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  "interaction_type_source" TEXT /* Source of the interaction type classification */,
  "interaction_type_confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the interaction type classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "secondary_structures" (
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each secondary structure type */,
  "structure_name" TEXT /* Name of the secondary structure type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the secondary structure type */,
  "structure_type_source" TEXT /* Source of the secondary structure classification */,
  "structure_type_confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the secondary structure classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein interaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the interaction data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "log_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the interaction data was accessed */,
  "log_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "log_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "log_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_logs_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES protein_interactions ("interaction_id")
)
